description_long: This is a three-seater urban couch with a modern, boxy silhouette and a sturdy, rectangular frame. The seat and back cushions are upholstered in a light beige fabric, showing some visible wear and subtle discoloration, suggesting frequent use. The armrests and base are covered in a contrasting dark material, likely faux leather or vinyl, which wraps around the sides and back for a sleek, contemporary look. The couch sits low to the ground, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and solid appearance. The cushions are thick and appear to be attached, providing a firm yet comfortable seating surface. There are no visible accent pillows or decorative elements, emphasizing a utilitarian and minimalist design suitable for public or semi-public urban environments.
description: A modern, three-seater couch with light beige cushions and a dark, boxy frame, featuring attached seat and back cushions and no visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows three light beige seat and back cushions framed by dark, rectangular armrests and base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the solid, dark armrest and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous dark back panel and the tops of the three back cushions.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the dark armrest and the profile of the attached cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached seat cushions and three attached back cushions, evenly spaced, with no accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and visible wear; no decorative stitching, tufting, or patterns.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visible; the base appears to rest directly on the ground, giving a block-like appearance.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are straight, rectangular, and fully upholstered in dark material, matching the base and back.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, attached backrest divided into three sections, each corresponding to a seat cushion, with a simple, unadorned design.
